app.name: Apex-Build Architecture Intelligence Map Example
app.primary_runtime: full-stack web app with AI-agent build pipeline

layers.name: User / Device Layer
layers.description: Entry points and untrusted client devices.

layers.name: Presentation Layer
layers.description: Visible UI composition, routes, component tree, forms, accessibility, error boundaries.

layers.name: Client Runtime Layer
layers.description: API clients, client auth, local cache, offline queue, analytics, flags.

layers.name: Edge / API Entry Layer
layers.description: CDN, WAF, API ingress, load balancing, rate limiting, request validation.

layers.name: Auth / Security Layer
layers.description: Authentication, authorization, tenant isolation, session validation, audit boundaries.

layers.name: Application Service Layer
layers.description: Handlers, services, domain logic, validation, transactions, background dispatch.

layers.name: AI / Agent Layer
layers.description: Prompt/model routing, context selection, tool execution, code generation, repair planning, cost control.

layers.name: Data Access Layer
layers.description: Repositories, ORM/query builder, migration rules, transaction scope, schema ownership.

layers.name: Persistence Layer
layers.description: SQL DB, cache, object storage, vector store, search index, queue storage, backups.

layers.name: Eventing / Async Layer
layers.description: Queues, workers, schedulers, pubsub, retry, DLQ, idempotency.

layers.name: Observability Layer
layers.description: Logs, metrics, traces, alerts, SLOs, incident annotations.

layers.name: DevOps / Runtime Platform Layer
layers.description: CI/CD, containers, environment config, deployments, rollbacks, health checks.

layers.name: External Integrations Layer
layers.description: Payments, email, OAuth, AI providers, Git, third-party APIs.

nodes.name: Web Frontend Shell
nodes.description: Top-level browser app shell and routing frame.

security.tenant_isolation_rule: All tenant-scoped queries must include tenant_id/project_id filters.

risk.rollback_strategy: feature flag off, revert commit, restore previous deployment

nodes.change_guidance: Before changing Web Frontend Shell, inspect inbound/outbound edges, contracts, tests, recent deploy diff, telemetry, and tenant constraints.

ai_usage.safe_repair_pattern: Make minimal change, add/update tests, validate contracts, run focused build/test, generate rollback note.

edges.description: Builder UI invokes typed API client.
IDE requests files, diffs, diagnostics, and preview state.
edges.failure_behavior: Editor stale or unable to save.

edges.description: Frontend sends authenticated request with request ID and tenant context.
Gateway validates session and tenant access.
Routes build session operations.
Session service starts AI build plan routing.
edges.failure_behavior: Wrong build strategy or no AI plan.

edges.description: Prompt router requires repo context bundle.
edges.failure_behavior: AI edits wrong files or misses needed files.

edges.description: Context selector inspects current repo tree and diffs.
Context bundle sent through model router.
Model router calls provider or BYOK endpoint.
edges.failure_behavior: Rate limit, provider error, cost spike.

edges.description: Every model call records estimated and actual usage cost.
Model router reads allowed encrypted BYOK credentials via secrets layer.
edges.failure_behavior: Provider auth failure or secret leakage risk.

edges.description: Build session enqueues generation/repair/deploy job.
Worker consumes build jobs.
Worker invokes safe tool execution layer.
Tool executor runs isolated build/test commands.
Tool executor applies diffs/commits/branches.
Successful build can deploy preview.
Persists session state and transitions.
Persists usage and billing events.
Caches hot build status.
edges.failure_behavior: Stale UI or excessive DB load.

edges.description: Stores build logs/artifacts.
Emits logs/metrics/traces for session operations.
Emits AI repair loop traces, changed files, tool calls, model costs.

contracts.name: Build Session UI/API Contract
contracts.validation_strategy: Zod/OpenAPI validation on request and response; contract tests run in CI.
breaking_change_rules: Do not remove fields consumed by UI without migration.
All status enum changes require UI handling and e2e test.

contracts.name: AI Context Bundle Contract
contracts.validation_strategy: Validate required files, symbol graph, token estimate, omitted-critical-file risk.
breaking_change_rules: Context bundles must include changed files, owning contracts, and failing tests when available.

contracts.name: AI Tool Call Contract
contracts.validation_strategy: Allowlisted commands, typed args, sandbox policy, approval policy, timeout, output capture.
breaking_change_rules: No new mutating tool without policy and audit telemetry.

contracts.name: External AI Provider Contract
contracts.validation_strategy: Normalize provider request/response, usage tokens, errors, rate limits, retries.
breaking_change_rules: Provider error taxonomy must stay stable for fallback logic.

contracts.name: BYOK Secret Access Contract
contracts.validation_strategy: Envelope encryption, scoped provider permission, no plaintext logging, access audit.
breaking_change_rules: Any secret access path requires audit event and tenant authorization.

blast_radius.name: Blast-Radius Overlay
blast_radius.description: Highlights all nodes, contracts, tests, and deployments affected by a proposed change.

change_risk.name: Change-Risk Overlay
change_risk.description: Scores changes by criticality, coverage, churn, ownership, runtime traffic, SLO history, and tenant/data sensitivity.

security.name: Security Trust-Boundary Overlay
security.description: Shows trust transitions, auth checks, secret dependencies, tenant boundaries, PII access, and policy enforcement gaps.

cost_flow.name: AI/Infra Cost-Flow Overlay
cost_flow.description: Traces model calls, token usage, BYOK usage, build runner minutes, storage, and margin risk.

latency_waterfall.name: Latency Waterfall Overlay
latency_waterfall.description: Shows request/job latency by edge and node with P50/P95/P99 and timeout/retry markers.

test_coverage.name: Test Coverage Overlay
test_coverage.description: Maps unit/integration/e2e/contract/security/load tests onto nodes and edges.

deployment_diff.name: Deployment Diff Overlay
deployment_diff.description: Highlights what changed between the last healthy deploy and current deploy.

feature_flags.name: Feature Flag Impact Overlay
feature_flags.description: Shows which nodes/edges are gated by flags and which users/tenants are exposed.

migration_risk.name: Migration-Risk Overlay
migration_risk.description: Finds DB/schema changes, affected queries, data backfill status, rollback risk, and contract breakage.

tenant_boundaries.name: Tenant Boundary Overlay
tenant_boundaries.description: Verifies tenant_id/project_id propagation through UI, API, services, DB, cache, queue, and AI tools.

diagnostic_playbooks.symptom: UI shows stale or wrong build/session data
likely_causes: DB write failed or wrong tenant filter
AI repair wrote state to wrong location
checks: Compare UI state with API response
Inspect request trace ID end-to-end
Check Redis key TTL and tenant-scoped key
Query DB row updated_at/status/version
Check queue lag and worker logs
Check last deploy diff and feature flag exposure
Check contract build_session status enum

decision_tree.if: API response correct but UI wrong
decision_tree.then: Inspect state management, cache invalidation, component props, stale closure, optimistic update rollback.

decision_tree.if: API response stale and Redis hit
decision_tree.then: Invalidate cache path and fix write-through/cache-key tenant/version issue.
Inspect service query/cache path and serialization contract.
Scale worker or fix stuck job/retry/DLQ issue.

safe_repair_plan: Trace from UI request ID to DB/queue/worker.
Add contract/e2e regression test for status update visibility.
Run focused tests and validate telemetry.
rollback_plan: Restore previous deployment if session visibility remains degraded.

diagnostic_playbooks.symptom: AI generated broken or incomplete code
likely_causes: Tool executor applied diff to wrong file
Build runner did not run correct command
checks: Inspect context bundle contents and omitted-file risk
Review changed files and dependency graph
Run build/test/lint command from Build Runner
Check contract violations
Compare generated code against schema/API contracts
Review AI decision trace: why each file was touched
Inspect provider/model/cost/fallback logs

decision_tree.then: Expand context around dependency owners and regenerate minimal patch.
Repair producer/consumer mismatch, not just UI symptoms.
Fix repo map/code-location index and require owner-match before write.

safe_repair_plan: Record why files were touched and rollback diff.
rollback_plan: Mark context-selector rule as unsafe until fixed.

diagnostic_playbooks.symptom: Model/provider cost spike or dollar ticker mismatch
checks: Compare estimated vs actual provider usage
Inspect retry/fallback count
Check model routing decision
Check context bundle token size
Check usage_events DB rows
Check BYOK credential path and provider account used

decision_tree.then: Fix token estimator and context pruning.
Fix BYOK route authorization and billing attribution.

safe_repair_plan: Add budget guardrail in model router.
Add regression test for cost attribution.

quality_gates.name: Contracts Required for Cross-Layer Edges
quality_gates.rule: Every UI->API, API->DB, event, external API, or AI tool edge must reference a contract.

quality_gates.name: Tenant Context Propagation
quality_gates.rule: Every authenticated edge that reaches data/cache/queue/AI tools must preserve tenant/project context.

quality_gates.name: AI File Touch Explanation
quality_gates.rule: Every AI-generated diff must explain why each file was inspected and why each file was modified.

quality_gates.name: Model Cost Accounting
quality_gates.rule: Every model call must emit model_call_id, provider, model, tokens, estimated_cost, actual_cost, and billing attribution.

quality_gates.name: Rollback Plan Required
quality_gates.rule: Any high/critical node change requires rollback steps and affected tests before merge/deploy.
